conversationFlow.global_prompt:
Here is a strong copy-paste prompt you can use in Vibe Coding / AI website builders (Lovable, Bolt, Replit, Durable, etc.) to create a sexy restaurant website + AI receptionist for El Cangrejo con Guayabera.
This prompt tells the AI exactly what to build so it looks premium and actually useful for customers. 🦀✨

⸻

PROMPT (COPY & PASTE)

Build a modern, sexy restaurant website with an AI receptionist for a restaurant called El Cangrejo con Guayabera.

The website should feel luxury, tropical, and vibrant, inspired by coastal Ecuador and Guayaquil seafood culture.

Design style:
	•	Dark tropical theme
	•	Colors: deep ocean blue, coral red, gold accents, white text
	•	Cinematic seafood photography
	•	Smooth animations
	•	Elegant typography
	•	Mobile-first design
	•	Premium restaurant vibe like Michelin seafood restaurants

The website must include a 24/7 AI receptionist chatbot that can answer questions, help customers reserve tables, and provide menu information.

⸻

HERO SECTION

Large cinematic background video of fresh seafood and crab dishes.

Headline:
“Auténtico Sabor Guayaco en Quito”

Subheadline:
Experience the best Ecuadorian crab and coastal seafood in a vibrant atmosphere.

Buttons:
	•	Reserve a Table
	•	View Menu
	•	Chat with Receptionist

⸻

AI RECEPTIONIST (IMPORTANT)

Create a floating AI receptionist chat widget in the bottom corner.

The AI receptionist should act like a friendly restaurant host.

It should automatically greet visitors with:

“Hola 👋 Bienvenido a El Cangrejo con Guayabera.
¿Quieres reservar una mesa, ver el menú o hacer una pregunta?”

The AI receptionist should answer questions about:

Reservations
Menu items
Opening hours
Location
Parking
Family friendly options
WiFi availability

Restaurant information the AI should know:

Name: El Cangrejo con Guayabera
Phone: 096 359 9749
Address: Tomas de Berlanga N43 E7A e, Isla Santa Fe, Quito 170501

Hours:
Open daily until 10 PM

Service options:
	•	Reservations required
	•	WiFi available
	•	Kids menu available

The AI should also offer quick buttons:

Reserve a Table
View Menu
Call Restaurant
Get Directions

⸻

ABOUT SECTION

Title:
La Experiencia del Cangrejo

Description:
El Cangrejo con Guayabera brings the authentic flavors of Ecuador’s coast to Quito. Known for its famous crab dishes and Guayaquil-inspired recipes, the restaurant delivers fresh seafood, bold flavor, and unforgettable dining experiences.

⸻

FEATURED DISHES

Create a modern grid showing popular dishes:

Cangrejos
Cangrejo al Ajillo
Conchas Asadas con Cangrejo
Canasta de Patacón con Cangrejo

Each dish should include:
	•	Image
	•	Short description
	•	Price placeholder

⸻

SOCIAL PROOF

Display rating section:

⭐ 4.5 / 5 rating
550+ reviews

Customer testimonial cards.

⸻

RESERVATION SECTION

Simple reservation form:

Name
Phone
Number of guests
Date
Time

Button:
Reserve Table

⸻

LOCATION SECTION

Embed Google Maps with the restaurant location.

Address:

Tomas de Berlanga N43 E7A e
Isla Santa Fe
Quito 170501

Buttons:
Get Directions
Call Restaurant

⸻

PHOTO GALLERY

Modern masonry gallery of restaurant food, atmosphere, and guests.

⸻

FOOTER

Include:

Restaurant name
Address
Phone
Opening hours
Social media icons (Facebook, Instagram)

Tagline:

El Cangrejo con Guayabera — Auténtico Sabor Guayaco

⸻

TECH FEATURES

SEO optimized
Fast loading
Mobile responsive
Smooth animations
Sticky navbar
AI receptionist chatbot
Reservation system
Menu section
Google Maps integration

⸻

💡 Tip (this is powerful):
If you want, I can also give you a “AI restaurant receptionist SaaS prompt” that restaurants will pay $50–$300/month for — which could help you start making money with this.

instruction.text: Hello this is customer support department, how can I help you today?

transition_condition.prompt: User needs to return the package
User needs to check the order status
